center.name: 努古里亞群島
center.summary: 努古里亞群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Atoll starling，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern Melanesia: Green Islands, Nuguria, Ninigo, Hermit Islands and Ontong Java Atoll

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in northern Melanesia: Green Islands, Nuguria, Ninigo, Hermit Islands and Ontong Java Atoll
